free_text: Study of Al-27 by the Mg-26(d,n)Al-27 reaction.
The MgO, enriched to 99% in Mg-26, thicknesses
100 mug/cm**2 and 300 mug/cm**2 at 6 MeV and 8 MeV,
respectively, on 0.1 mm tantalum backing, were used.
The absolute differential cross sections were corrected
by about 15% for neutron absorption in the wall of the
scattering chamber and in the air along the flight
*EN-RSL*.The energy resolution at E(d)=6 MeV varied
from 32 keV at E-LVL=6.16 MeV to 18 keV at
The total uncertainty in absolute cross
sections connected errors in target thickness and
.The uncertainty is reported by authors on
